Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoderGamester/mcp-unity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoderGamester/mcp-unity
Language: c%23
Model Context Protocol (MCP) plugin to connect with Unity Editor — designed for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf and other IDEs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DearVa/Everywhere
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DearVa/Everywhere
Language: c%23
Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yaobiao131/downkyicore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yaobiao131/downkyicore
Language: c%23
哔哩下载姬(跨平台版)downkyi，哔哩哔哩网站视频下载工具，支持批量下载，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界，提供工具箱（音视频提取、去水印等）。
